hero.title: You're losing RFPs,
hero.subtitle: Not because your product isn't good enough — because your team ran out of time. {{businessName}} turns 40-hour RFP marathons into a 2-hour review.

security.label: Security & Privacy
security.title: Your AI, your data — nothing leaves your control.
security.subtitle: {{businessName}} runs exclusively on your knowledge base — not generic internet data. Security isn't an add-on — it's the foundation.

trustBadges.aes256Desc: All data encrypted at rest and in transit. Zero plaintext storage.
trustBadges.tenantDesc: Every workspace is fully isolated. Your data is never shared or mixed.
trustBadges.gdprDesc: Data residency in India, EU, or US. Dedicated DPO oversight.
trustBadges.noAiDesc: Your documents are never used to train models. Period.
trustBadges.auditDesc: Every action logged and traceable. Complete visibility for compliance reviews.

problem.label: The Problem
problem.title: RFPs are killing your sales bandwidth
problem.subtitle: Your best salespeople spend weeks on paperwork instead of closing deals. That stops now.
problem.stat1Desc: A single enterprise RFP can consume an entire week of your presales team's time, slowing down every deal in the pipeline.
problem.stat2Desc: The answers already exist in your previous RFPs, but they're scattered across emails, docs, and shared drives nobody can search.
problem.stat3Desc: Loopio and RFPIO charge $20-40K+ per year — overkill for most mid-market teams who just need a smarter, faster way to respond.

howItWorks.label: How it works
howItWorks.title: Up and running in 30 minutes
howItWorks.subtitle: No complex implementation. No lengthy onboarding. Live within hours.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Past RFPs, case studies, product docs, compliance certs
howItWorks.step2Desc: AI indexes everything into a searchable, private library
howItWorks.step3Desc: Paste or upload any RFP in any format
howItWorks.step4Desc: Every question answered, with source citations
howItWorks.step5Desc: Edit, approve, export. Done in hours, not weeks.

testimonials.label: Customer Stories
testimonials.title: Teams that switched never looked back.
testimonials.quote1: We used to spend 3 weeks on a single RFP. Now we submit in 2 days — and our win rate went up 40%.
testimonials.quote2: The AI drafts are scary accurate. It pulls from our past responses and nails the tone every time. Our team finally has bandwidth to focus on deals.
testimonials.quote3: We evaluated Loopio and RFPIO — both were 10x our budget. {{businessName}} gives us 90% of the capability at a fraction of the cost.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Straightforward pricing. No surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Start free for {{days}} days. No credit card required.

whyUs.label: Why {{businessName}}
whyUs.title: AI-first. Affordable. Fast.
whyUs.subtitle: Built for the 95% of companies that existing tools price out of the market.

cta.title: Stop losing deals to slow proposals.
cta.subtitle: Join teams already winning more RFPs with {{businessName}}. Set up in 30 minutes, start submitting today.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Yes. Your knowledge base is completely private to your organisation. We do not use your documents to train any shared model. Your data is yours.
faq.a2: We support data residency in India, the EU, and the US. Enterprise customers can specify their preferred region during onboarding.
faq.q3: Who can see our RFP responses?
faq.a3: Only users within your workspace. Access is role-controlled — admins can manage permissions across the team.
faq.q4: Can we use this for sensitive or confidential RFPs?
faq.a4: Yes. All data is encrypted at rest and in transit using AES-256. We do not share, sell, or access your documents.
faq.q5: How long does it take to get set up?
faq.a5: Most teams are live within 30 minutes. Upload your past RFPs and docs, and the AI indexes everything automatically — no IT involvement needed.
faq.q6: Do you integrate with our CRM or document tools?
faq.a6: Salesforce integration is available on the Enterprise plan. Integrations with Google Drive, SharePoint, and Slack are on the roadmap.
faq.q7: What happens after the free trial?
faq.a7: You choose a plan or your account pauses — no surprise charges. Your uploaded knowledge base is retained for 30 days after the trial ends.
faq.q8: Is there a contract or can we cancel anytime?
faq.a8: Monthly plans can be cancelled anytime. Annual plans include a 20% discount and are billed upfront.

product.label: Product
product.title: AI-first RFP responses in your voice.
product.subtitle: {{businessName}} learns from your past responses, docs, and case studies. Upload once, then let AI draft answers question by question — with source citations and your tone — so you win more RFPs in hours, not weeks.
product.step1Desc: Add past RFP responses, proposals, and case studies. {{businessName}} indexes your content securely into a private knowledge base.
product.step2Desc: Paste RFP questions. AI generates answers in your voice with citations to your source documents — every answer is traceable.
product.step3Desc: Edit, approve, and export to PDF or Word. Cut response time from weeks to hours with full team collaboration.
product.featuresTitle: Everything you need to win more bids
product.feat1Desc: Upload past RFPs, proposals, case studies, and compliance docs. AI indexes everything into a searchable, private library that gets smarter with every document.
product.feat2Desc: Every AI-drafted answer includes citations to the exact documents and sections it drew from. Full traceability, zero hallucination risk.
product.feat3Desc: Assign questions to subject matter experts, leave comments, and track approval status. Everyone works in one place — no more email chains.
product.feat4Desc: Export completed responses to PDF or Word with your branding. Salesforce integration available on Enterprise. Slack notifications keep your team in the loop.
product.feat5Desc: Track how answers evolve over time. Revert to previous versions, compare drafts, and maintain a complete audit trail of every response.
product.feat6Desc: Every workspace is fully isolated. Role-based access control, AES-256 encryption, ISO 27001 compliance, and data residency options across India, EU, and US.
product.without2: Answers scattered across drives and emails
product.with2: One searchable knowledge base for everything
product.with3: AI drafts answers with source citations
product.with5: Compete on RFPs you previously skipped
product.with6: Senior staff focus on strategy and deals
product.readySubtitle: Set up in 30 minutes. Start submitting polished responses today.
product.readyNoCreditCard: No credit card required · Cancel anytime

privacy.label: Legal
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: {{businessName}} Inc. ("{{businessName}}," "we," "our," or "us") is a Canadian corporation committed to protecting your privacy in accordance with the Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act (PIPEDA), the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), and applicable provincial and international privacy laws. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our platform and services.
privacy.infoWeCollectDesc: We collect the following categories of information:
privacy.infoAccount: Account Information: name, email address, organization name, and role when you register via Clerk authentication.
privacy.infoContent: Content Data: RFP documents, knowledge base files, drafted answers, comments, and other content you upload or create on the platform. This is your data — we do not claim ownership.
privacy.infoUsage: Usage Data: feature usage, token consumption, session duration, and interaction patterns collected automatically to improve the service.
privacy.infoDevice: Device & Technical Data: IP address, browser type, operating system, and referring URLs collected via server logs.
privacy.infoBilling: Billing Data: payment method details processed and stored by Stripe. We do not store full credit card numbers on our servers.
privacy.trackingDesc: We do not use advertising cookies, tracking pixels, or cross-site tracking. We use only essential cookies required for authentication (via Clerk) and session management. No data is sold to advertisers or data brokers.
privacy.analyticsDesc: We use privacy-focused analytics to understand how our service is used and to diagnose issues. Analytics data is aggregated and does not include your document content or RFP answers.
privacy.aiDesc: Your documents and RFP content are processed by AI models solely to provide the service (drafting answers, extracting questions, etc.). We make the following commitments:
privacy.ai1: Your data is never used to train AI models. We use inference-only API calls.
privacy.ai2: Document content is processed in real-time and not stored by AI providers beyond the duration of the API call.
privacy.ai3: All AI processing is scoped to your organization — no data crosses tenant boundaries.
privacy.ai4: We use third-party AI providers for inference. Data sent to these providers is governed by their data processing agreements with us and is not used for their model training.
privacy.thirdPartyDesc: We use the following categories of third-party services to operate the platform:
privacy.thirdParty3: Infrastructure: AWS (hosting, S3 storage, database), encrypted at rest and in transit
privacy.thirdParty4: AI Processing: Third-party AI and search providers (inference only, no training on your data)
privacy.thirdPartyMore: Data shared with these providers is governed by data processing agreements. We select vendors that maintain SOC 2, ISO 27001, or equivalent certifications where available.
privacy.howWeUseDesc: We use collected information to: provide, maintain, and improve the service; process transactions and send billing communications; respond to support requests; enforce our Terms of Service; comply with legal obligations; and detect and prevent fraud or abuse. We do not sell, rent, or share your personal information with third parties for marketing purposes.
privacy.dataRetentionDesc: We retain your data for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide services. When you delete your account or request data deletion, we will remove your personal information and content within 30 days, except where retention is required by law (e.g., billing records, audit logs). Backup copies may persist for up to 90 days before automatic purging.
privacy.dataSecurityDesc: We implement industry-standard security measures including: AES-256 encryption at rest for all stored data; TLS 1.2+ encryption for all data in transit; multi-tenant isolation enforced at the database, API, and vector store layers; regular security assessments and dependency auditing; and role-based access control via Clerk organization roles.
privacy.dataResidencyDesc: By default, data is stored in AWS regions in Canada and the United States. Enterprise customers may request specific data residency in the EU, India, or other supported regions. Contact us for data residency requirements.
privacy.yourRightsDesc: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have the following rights regarding your personal information:
privacy.right1: Access: Request a copy of the personal data we hold about you.
privacy.right2: Correction: Request correction of inaccurate or incomplete data.
privacy.right3: Deletion: Request deletion of your personal data ("right to be forgotten").
privacy.right4: Portability: Request your data in a structured, machine-readable format.
privacy.right5: Objection: Object to processing of your data for specific purposes.
privacy.right6: Withdrawal of Consent: Withdraw consent at any time where processing is based on consent.
privacy.yourRightsHow: To exercise any of these rights, contact us through our Contact page. We will respond within 30 days (or within the timeframe required by applicable law).
privacy.gdprDesc: For users in the European Economic Area (EEA), we process personal data under the following legal bases: performance of a contract (providing the service), legitimate interest (improving and securing the service), consent (where explicitly requested), and legal obligation (compliance with applicable laws). Our lawful basis for international data transfers is Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs).
privacy.ccpaDesc: California residents have the right to know what personal information we collect, request deletion, opt out of the sale of personal information (we do not sell personal information), and non-discrimination for exercising privacy rights.
privacy.changesDesc: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Material changes will be communicated via email or in-app notification at least 14 days before taking effect. The "Last updated" date at the top indicates when this policy was last revised.
privacy.contactDesc: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, wish to exercise your data rights, or need to report a privacy concern, please contact us through our
privacy.contactExtra: You may also contact the Office of the Privacy Commissioner of Canada (OPC) if you believe your privacy rights have been violated.

terms.label: Legal
terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: Welcome to {{businessName}}. These Terms of Service ("Terms") constitute a legally binding agreement between you and {{businessName}} Inc., a Canadian corporation, governing your use of the {{businessName}} platform, website, and related services (collectively, the "Service"). By accessing or using the Service, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree, do not use the Service.
terms.acceptanceDesc: By creating an account or using the Service, you represent that you are at least 18 years of age and have the legal authority to enter into these Terms. If you are using the Service on behalf of an organization, you represent that you have the authority to bind that organization to these Terms.
terms.accountDesc: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activity under your account. You must provide accurate and complete registration information and notify us immediately of any unauthorized access. We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms.
terms.serviceDescDesc: {{businessName}} is an AI-powered RFP response platform that helps enterprise sales teams draft, review, and manage proposal responses using retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) from your organization's knowledge base. The Service includes document indexing, AI-assisted answer drafting, compliance checking, review workflows, and export functionality.
terms.aiUsageDesc: The Service uses artificial intelligence to generate draft answers and analysis. You acknowledge that:
terms.ai1: AI-generated content is provided as a draft and should be reviewed, edited, and approved by qualified human reviewers before submission.
terms.ai2: {{businessName}} does not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or suitability of AI-generated content for any particular purpose.
terms.ai3: You are solely responsible for the final content you submit in response to RFPs, and for verifying all claims, figures, and statements.
terms.ai4: AI outputs may contain errors, omissions, or inaccuracies. You should treat all AI-generated content as a starting point, not a final product.
terms.dataOwnershipDesc: You retain full ownership of all content you upload to or create on the platform, including documents, RFP responses, knowledge base entries, and any other materials. We do not claim any intellectual property rights over your content. We will not use your content to train AI models. Your content is processed only to provide the Service.
terms.licenseDesc: Subject to these Terms and payment of applicable fees, we grant you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable, revocable license to access and use the Service for your internal business purposes. You may not sublicense, resell, or redistribute the Service.
terms.prohibited1: Use the Service for any unlawful purpose or in violation of any applicable laws or regulations.
terms.prohibited2: Attempt to reverse-engineer, decompile, or extract the source code of the Service.
terms.prohibited3: Interfere with or disrupt the Service or its infrastructure.
terms.prohibited4: Upload content that infringes third-party intellectual property rights.
terms.prohibited5: Use the Service to generate fraudulent, misleading, or deceptive RFP responses.
terms.prohibited6: Share account credentials or allow unauthorized access to your account.
terms.prohibited7: Attempt to circumvent usage limits, rate limits, or billing controls.
terms.billingDesc: Paid plans are billed in advance on a monthly or annual basis. Prices are in USD unless otherwise stated. Each plan includes a token allowance for AI features; usage beyond the included allowance is billed as overage at the rate specified for your plan. All fees are non-refundable except as required by applicable law or as explicitly stated in our refund policy. We reserve the right to change pricing with 30 days' advance notice.
terms.slaDesc: We commit to the following service levels for paid plans:
terms.uptimeDesc: We target 99.9% monthly uptime for the {{businessName}} platform, excluding scheduled maintenance communicated at least 48 hours in advance. If we fall short, eligible customers may request service credits in accordance with their plan terms.
terms.responseDesc: We prioritize support tickets by severity:
terms.p1Desc: System down or major feature unavailable — initial response within 4 business hours.
terms.p2Desc: Significant impact with potential workaround — initial response within 8 business hours.
terms.p3Desc: General questions or minor issues — initial response within 24 business hours.
terms.supportDesc: Standard support is available Monday through Friday, 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM Eastern Time (ET). Enterprise customers may have extended support hours as specified in their agreement.
terms.confidentialityDesc: We treat all content you upload as confidential information. We will not disclose your content to third parties except as necessary to provide the Service (e.g., AI inference providers under data processing agreements), as required by law, or with your explicit written consent.
terms.liabilityDesc: TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY APPLICABLE LAW, {{businessName}} INC. AND ITS OFFICERS, DIRECTORS, EMPLOYEES, AND AGENTS SHALL NOT BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES, OR ANY LOSS OF PROFITS, DATA, USE, OR GOODWILL, ARISING OUT OF OR IN CONNECTION WITH THESE TERMS OR YOUR USE OF THE SERVICE, REGARDLESS OF THE THEORY OF LIABILITY. OUR TOTAL AGGREGATE LIABILITY SHALL NOT EXCEED THE AMOUNTS PAID BY YOU TO US IN THE TWELVE (12) MONTHS PRECEDING THE CLAIM.
terms.indemnityDesc: You agree to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless {{businessName}} Inc. and its affiliates from and against any claims, damages, losses, liabilities, costs, and expenses (including reasonable legal fees) arising from your use of the Service, your violation of these Terms, or your violation of any third-party rights.
terms.terminationDesc: Either party may terminate these Terms at any time. You may cancel your account through the Service or by contacting us. We may suspend or terminate your access if you violate these Terms. Upon termination, your right to use the Service ceases immediately. We will retain your data for 30 days after termination to allow you to export it, after which it will be deleted in accordance with our Privacy Policy.
terms.governingLawDesc: These Terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Province of Ontario and the federal laws of Canada applicable therein, without regard to conflict of law principles. Any disputes arising under these Terms shall be resolved in the courts of the Province of Ontario, Canada.
terms.generalDesc: These Terms constitute the entire agreement between you and {{businessName}} regarding the Service. If any provision is found unenforceable, the remaining provisions remain in full effect. Our failure to enforce any right or provision does not constitute a waiver. We may assign our rights under these Terms; you may not assign yours without our written consent. We may update these Terms from time to time; material changes will be communicated at least 14 days in advance via email or in-app notification. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance.
terms.contactDesc: For questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us through our Contact page or email us at legal@spondic.com.

footer.madeWithLove: Made with love from Canada to the world
